purpose: Strategy universe derived from boss literature before final dashboard UI polish.

candidate_strategies.name: WorldQuant-Inspired ETF Alpha Basket
candidate_strategies.signal: Ranked blend of short-horizon momentum and reversal proxies
candidate_strategies.rebalance: weekly prototype; paper-style alphas can be daily or faster
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Research only until operator library and point-in-time data are complete

candidate_strategies.name: Quality Value Momentum Rotation
candidate_strategies.signal: Style factor ranking, trend, reversal, and volatility filter
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: ETF-coverable strategy candidate

strategy_families.name: Hedge Fund Replication
strategy_families.source: Hasanhodzic and Lo hedge fund replication

candidate_strategies.name: Liquid Alternative Factor Premia Clone
candidate_strategies.signal: Liquid factor premia basket with volatility stress tilt
missing_data: target hedge fund return series for true clone validation
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Runnable ETF-coverable clone proxy

candidate_strategies.name: Credit Carry With Stress Gate
candidate_strategies.signal: Carry exposure only when credit and volatility regimes are supportive
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Useful for hedge fund carry/credit beta sleeve

candidate_strategies.name: Convertible Arbitrage Proxy
candidate_strategies.signal: Convertible return decomposition into equity, credit, and rates proxies
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: ETF proxy for a hedge fund style that may be partially replicable

candidate_strategies.name: Merger Arbitrage Proxy
candidate_strategies.signal: Merger arbitrage ETF spread proxy with beta and event-risk monitor
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Replication candidate with explicit warning that event alpha may not replicate

strategy_families.name: Macro And Business-Cycle Regime Allocation
strategy_families.source: JPM regime investing and business-cycle dynamic allocation

candidate_strategies.name: Business-Cycle Regime Allocation
candidate_strategies.signal: Growth and inflation proxy phase map
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Regime explanation and allocation tilt candidate

candidate_strategies.name: Rates Duration Regime
candidate_strategies.signal: Duration tilt based on growth, inflation, and risk-off regime
missing_data: yield curve and inflation proxy calibration
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Rates sleeve for contraction and slowdown risk management

candidate_strategies.name: Commodity Inflation Shock Sleeve
candidate_strategies.signal: Commodity and USD inflation shock proxy
missing_data: roll yield and futures curve data
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Inflation and supply-shock risk sleeve

candidate_strategies.name: USD Macro Pressure Sleeve
candidate_strategies.signal: USD trend and risk-off pressure
missing_data: broader FX ETF coverage or futures data
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Macro stress and liquidity pressure monitor

strategy_families.name: Markov / High-Volatility Defensive Regimes
strategy_families.institutional_role: Defensive switching and stress covariance logic

candidate_strategies.name: High-Volatility Regime Defensive Switch
candidate_strategies.signal: High-volatility stress probability from realized vol, VIX, and drawdown
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Defensive allocation and correlation stress candidate

candidate_strategies.name: Tail Hedge Crisis Sleeve
candidate_strategies.signal: Activate when high-vol regime probability and drawdown stress rise
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Hedge candidate, not return-seeking allocation

candidate_strategies.name: Risk Parity ETF Overlay
candidate_strategies.signal: Volatility-scaled cross-asset allocation with stress de-risking
missing_data: formal risk budget and leverage assumptions
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Portfolio stabilizer and benchmark comparison sleeve

strategy_families.name: Managed Futures And Trend Replication
strategy_families.source: Hedge fund replication and managed futures category

candidate_strategies.name: Managed Futures Trend Proxy
candidate_strategies.signal: Cross-asset medium-term trend with cash fallback
missing_data: futures-level trend universe and roll assumptions
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: ETF-coverable trend sleeve, currently requires drawdown review

strategy_families.name: Relative Value, Arbitrage, And Event-Risk Proxies
strategy_families.source: Hedge fund replication limitations and ETF-coverable hedge fund styles
strategy_families.institutional_role: Diversifying sleeves that require strict cost, liquidity, and event-risk controls

candidate_strategies.name: Index Arbitrage Proxy
candidate_strategies.signal: ETF basis, liquidity, and tracking-difference proxy
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Low-edge strategy candidate, useful mainly for cost discipline and execution-risk demonstration

candidate_strategies.name: Treasury Basis / Curve Relative Value Proxy
candidate_strategies.signal: Treasury curve relative value using short, intermediate, and long duration ETFs
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Rates RV proxy with explicit funding-stress limitation

candidate_strategies.name: Event-Driven Sector Risk Proxy
candidate_strategies.signal: Sector/event risk sleeve with merger-arb and cash buffer
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Event-driven placeholder until news/event API is available

strategy_families.name: Global, Style, And Volatility Overlay Sleeves
strategy_families.source: Business-cycle allocation, regime investing, and hedge fund style replication
strategy_families.institutional_role: Additional sleeves for scaling from 20 strategies toward 30-40 strategies

candidate_strategies.name: Global Value Rotation
candidate_strategies.signal: Regional and style rotation using value/growth, developed, and emerging market proxies
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Global equity style sleeve with macro and FX risk controls

candidate_strategies.name: Emerging Markets Macro Risk Sleeve
candidate_strategies.signal: EM risk appetite filtered by USD strength, credit stress, and commodity/risk-off proxies
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Higher-risk macro sleeve, useful only with strict drawdown and USD stress limits

candidate_strategies.name: Volatility Carry With Crash Filter
candidate_strategies.signal: Volatility carry proxy active only when VIX and realized-volatility stress filters are supportive
candidate_strategies.risk_manager_use: Tail-sensitive candidate, likely small allocation or research-only until vol data is robust
